records.ety: [OE. annuel, F. annuel, fr. L. annualis, fr. annus year. Cf. Annals.]

defs: Of or pertaining to a year; returning every year; coming or happening once in the year; yearly.
quotes: The annual overflowing of the river [Nile].

defs: Performed or accomplished in a year; reckoned by the year; as, the annual motion of the earth.
quotes: A thousand pound a year, annual support.

defs: Lasting or continuing only one year or one growing season; requiring to be renewed every year; as, an annual plant; annual tickets.
A thing happening or returning yearly; esp. a literary work published once a year.
Anything, especially a plant, that lasts but one year or season; an annual plant.
quotes: Oaths . . . in some sense almost annuals; . . . and I myself can remember about forty different sets.

defs: A Mass for a deceased person or for some special object, said daily for a year or on the anniversary day.
